km.Hilton, Durham, England: ហ៊ីលតន, ឌុរ៉ាម, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton於1375年出生。她於1395年與Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron在英國達勒姆希爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1395年享年20歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton于1375年出生。她于1395年与Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron在英国達勒姆希爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1395年享年20岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton was born in 1375. She married Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron in 1395, in Hilton, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1395, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton est née en 1375. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron en 1395, à Hilton, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1395, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton wurde 1375 geboren. Sie hat 1395 in Hilton, Durham, England Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1395 im Alter von 20 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton è nata il nel 1375. Lei sposato Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron nel 1395, nel Hilton, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1395, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.Hilton, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムヒルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Hiltonは1375年に生まれた。1395年にイギリスダルハムヒルトンでSir Robert Hilton VI Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1395年に20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton(은)는 1375년 태어났다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 뒤람 힐턴에서 Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton nasceu em 1375. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron em 1395, em Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1395, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton родилась в 1375 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron в 1395 г. в местности хилтон, дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1395 г. в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel Hilton nació en 1375. Se casó con Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron en 1395, en Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1395, a la edad de 20 años.
